---
title: "How AI Represents Cultural Values Across 66 Countries"
author: Yilin Xu
date: 2026-03-13
format: html
---

{{< include blog_part1_motivation.md >}}

{{< include blog_part2_ground_truth.md >}}

{{< include blog_part3_llm_experiment.md >}}

{{< include blog_part4_llm_representation_performance.md >}}

{{< include blog_part5_llm_representation_error.md >}}

{{< include blog_part6_conclusion.md >}}

Note: Given this is involved part of an ongoing research project, I do not publish it online
